LAW AND MOTION, 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF TOM CHURCH'S MOTION IN OPPOSITION TO DISMISSAL IS OFF CALENDAR, OPPOSITION TO COMMISSIONER BORICK'S O S C REGARDING DISMISSAL SHOULD BE BROUGHT TO COMMISSIONER BORICK. OPPOSITIONS TO MATTER BEFORE COMMISSIONER BORICK MAY NOT BE SCHEDULED IN DEPARTMENT 301 IN THE FUTURE. THIS IS THE THIRD TIME MR. CHURCH HAS DONE SO AND SHOULD NOT DO IT AGAIN. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL A. KAREN, CSR # 8189 =301/PJB
